[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010101000 3
1 010001100 3
2 000000100 1
3 000100001 2
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 011010000 3

01 10 010000000 1
12 21 010101010 4
23 32 011111000 5
34 43 010101000 3 match 0

56 65 000000100 1 match 2
67 76 000100001 2 match 3
70 07 010010001 3

02 20 011010000 3 match 7
13 31 010101000 3 match 0

46 64 000100100 2
57 75 010000000 1
60 06 000000001 1
71 17 010100000 2

36 63 000100001 2 match 3
47 74 010100000 2
50 05 010000000 1
61 16 100100110 4
72 27 010110000 3
